ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price at the timestamp */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the timestamp */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the timestamp */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price at the timestamp */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume at the timestamp */,
  "sma" REAL /* Simple Moving Average calculated over a period */,
  "bolup" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band calculated based on price volatility */,
  "boldn" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band calculated based on price volatility */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate at the time of data entry */,
  "market_index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial asset (e.g., Bitcoin, EUR/USD) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Stock, Forex, Commodity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which asset is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Market sector of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "trader_type" TEXT /* Type of trader (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the trader's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader conducting the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trading session (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., live, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session during which the order was placed */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset to be traded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price to limit potential losses */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price to secure potential gains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with this record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the status change */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the order (e.g., executed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who set the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which the alert is set */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., once, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, Dow Jones) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value for calculating changes in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Total profit or loss of the trader */,
  "winning_trades" INTEGER /* Number of winning trades */,
  "losing_trades" INTEGER /* Number of losing trades */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum peak-to-trough decline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_performance_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being analyzed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market analysis */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the asset's price (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset's price */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
